lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Ah, you come back! What you want from Arnold, heh?

lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Ja, I have wide range of stock...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, I just came to chat.

lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Ah, that is nice - always I like to chat, but Herr Caranos tell me to get back to work! Here, you been nice, so have a present:

lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Ja, cabbage is good for you!

sections.title: Talking again while holding the puzzle box

lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Arnold Lydspor
lines.text: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
